src_raw: 2018年是全球金融危機發生十周年，十年間國際政經形勢經歷巨大轉變，當中不乏一幕幕超乎最佳編劇所能想像的場景。我在去年的年報指出，2017年金融市場表現是「喜出望外」，同時提到前景「潛藏隱憂」。回顧2018年，或許可形容為「先喜後悲」。環球多個股票指數在1月創出歷史新高後不久，熾熱的投資情緒旋即遇上中美貿易摩擦的冷鋒，加上英國脫歐談判一直拉鋸、地緣政治惡化、美聯儲四次加息等因素，市場樂觀氣氛急劇逆轉，資產價格在年內大幅下跌。MSCI全球指數從高點至低點曾下跌20.3%，全年累跌約一成，是2008年環球金融危機以來表現最差的一年。恒生指數從高點最多曾下跌26.7%，全年下挫13.6%，錄得七年來最大年度跌幅。
mt_raw: 2018 marked the tenth anniversary of the global financial crisis. Over the past decade, the international political and economic landscape has undergone tremendous changes, with many scenes beyond the imagination of the best scriptwriters. In last year’s annual report, I noted that the performance of financial markets in 2017 was "beyond expectations," while also mentioning that the outlook "concealed underlying concerns." Looking back at 2018, perhaps it can be described as "initial joy followed by subsequent sadness." Shortly after multiple global stock indices reached historic highs in January, the overheated investment sentiment was met with the cooling effect of Sino-US trade frictions. Coupled with ongoing Brexit negotiations, escalating geopolitical tensions, and four Federal Reserve rate hikes, market optimism rapidly reversed, leading to significant asset price declines during the year. The MSCI worldwide index dropped 20.3% from its peak to its trough and recorded an overall decline of about 10% for the year, marking the worst performance since the global financial crisis in 2008. The Hang Seng Index at its peak fell by as much as 26.7%, ending the year down 13.6%, and posted the largest annual decline in seven years.

src_raw: 儘管外圍形勢波動難測，香港金融體系仍然保持穩健，貨幣市場運作暢順無阻。實施三十五年的聯繫匯率制度成功應對了資金流出港元的考驗。自環球金融危機爆發以來，累積約10,000億港元等值的資金流入港元。去年，隨着美國息率上升，港美息差持續擴闊，「沽港元、買美元」套息活動增加，港元兌美元匯率在年初轉弱，2005年制訂的「弱方兌換保證」，自4月首度觸發後，年內再觸發26次。金管局按照既定機制，履行「買港元、沽美元」的弱方兌換保證，有序、透明地在市場承接1,035億港元的港元沽盤。隨着資金流走，一個月香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內累升了105基點，而銀行亦在去年9月美國加息後，上調了最優惠利率。金管局多次和適時通過不同渠道向公眾闡釋「弱方兌換保證」的運作機制，令公眾了解資金流出港元是香港利率正常化的必經過程，也是聯匯制度的正常運作。國際貨幣基金組織在去年年底重申支持香港聯匯制度的立場，特區政府也強調聯匯是香港貨幣穩定的基石。這都有助於穩定香港市民對聯繫匯率的信心。
mt_raw: Despite unpredictable external fluctuations, Hong Kong’s financial system remained stable, with smooth operation of the currency market. The thirty-five-year-old Linked Exchange Rate System successfully responded to the challenge of outflows of funds from Hong Kong dollars. Since the outbreak of the global financial crisis, approximately HKD 1 trillion equivalent has been inflowed into the Hong Kong dollar. Last year, as U.S. interest rates rose, the Hong Kong-U.S. interest rate differential continued to widen, increasing the carry trade activities of selling HK dollars and buying U.S. dollars. The HK dollar depreciated against the USD at the beginning of the year, and since the first trigger of the "Weak-side Exchange Guarantee" established in 2005 in April, this mechanism was triggered 26 more times during the year. The HKMA, following established protocols, fulfilled the "buy HK dollars, sell USD" obligation under the Guarantee, orderly and transparently absorbing HKD 103.5 billion in sell orders. As capital flowed out, the average Hong Kong interbank offer rate rose by 105 basis points within the year. Following the U.S. rate hike last September, banks also increased their best lending rates. The HKMA frequently and appropriately explained the operation of the "Weak-side Exchange Guarantee" to the public through various channels, helping the public understand that capital outflows are a normal part of interest rate normalization and the functioning of the linked exchange rate system. The International Monetary Fund reaffirmed its support for Hong Kong’s Linked Exchange Rate System at the end of last year, and the HKSAR Government emphasized that the system is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary stability. These efforts have contributed to maintaining public confidence in the linked exchange rate policy.

src_raw: 2008年環球金融危機暴露了全球金融系統潛藏的種種弊端及隱患，促使國際間在過去十年協調推出一系列針對金融市場、金融機構的改革，包括在銀行業監管方面，提升企業管治和風險管理。金管局的銀行監管工作重點針對兩方面：一是着眼於銀行資產負債風險的審慎監管，二是銀行的行為操守，二者不可偏廢。資產負債風險監管方面，金管局作為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會(Basel Committee on Banking Supervision)及二十國集團轄下金融穩定理事會(FinancialStability Board)成員，有責任全面落實國際監管標準，確保香港銀行業穩健審慎地經營業務。去年底香港銀行資本充足率達20.3%，不但遠高於國際最低標準要求的8%，也較環球金融危機時的14.7%水平顯著提升。大型銀行去年第四季平均流動覆蓋比率達167.6%，同樣遠高於法定最低要求的90%。與此同時，為避免重蹈環球金融危機時需動用公帑拯救「大得不能倒」金融機構的覆轍，金融穩定理事會制訂了關於金融機構處置機制的國際標準。香港是亞洲區內少數已經全面落實符合機制要求的地區之一，金管局下設的處置機制辦公室正落實該機制的操作細則，要求銀行推行結構性變動令處置預案在需要時能有效實施，去年亦推出了《吸收虧損能力規則》，未來還會陸續推出更多相關規則。
mt_raw: The 2008 global financial crisis exposed the underlying deficiencies and risks within the international financial system. Over the past decade, international efforts coordinated the implementation of reforms targeting financial markets and institutions, including strengthening corporate governance and risk management in banking regulation. The HKMA’s banking supervision focuses on two aspects: prudential supervision of asset and liability risks, and the conduct of banks. Both are equally important. On prudential standards, as a member of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Stability Board under the G20, the HKMA has the responsibility to fully implement international regulatory standards to ensure the sound and prudent operation of Hong Kong banks. By the end of last year, Hong Kong’s total capital adequacy ratio reached 20.3%, far exceeding the minimum international standard of 8% and significantly higher than the 14.7% level during the global financial crisis. Large banks' average liquidity coverage ratio in the fourth quarter was 167.6%, well above the statutory minimum of 90%. Meanwhile, to prevent a recurrence of the “too big to fail” rescue scenario in the crisis, the Financial Stability Board established international standards for resolution mechanisms for financial institutions. Hong Kong is among the few regions in Asia to have fully implemented such mechanisms. The HKMA’s Resolution Office is now operational, implementing detailed procedures to ensure banks can effectively carry out structural changes and resolution plans when needed. In 2018, the HKMA also introduced the "Loss Absorption Capacity Regulations," with more related rules to follow in the future.

src_raw: 鑑於樓價持續上升，金管局未雨綢繆，在2009至2017年間共推出八輪逆周期措施，確保一旦地產市況逆轉，本港銀行體系有足夠的抗震能力應對衝擊。這些措施成效顯著：新造住宅平均按揭成數由2009年的64%降至2018年底的46%；平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年的41%下調至2018年底的34%。年內銀行信貸錄得4.4%的溫和增長，整體資產質素維持良好，零售銀行不良貸款比率進一步降至0.5%，遠低於國際及本港歷史平均水平。去年銀行業盈利持續增長，整體股東權益回報率連升兩年至13%；多家國際性銀行集團在本港的業務交出了不俗的成績表，成為集團盈利的重要支柱。
mt_raw: Given the persistent rise in property prices, the HKMA proactively implemented eight countercyclical measures between 2009 and 2017, ensuring that the banking sector in Hong Kong has sufficient resilience to weather market reversals. The results are notable: the average mortgage loan-to-value ratio for new residential properties decreased from 64% in 2009 to 46% at the end of 2018; the average debt service-to-income ratio also fell from 41% in 2010 to 34% at year-end 2018. During the year, bank credit grew moderately by 4.4%, and overall asset quality remained good, with retail banking non-performing loan ratio further dropping to 0.5%, well below international and Hong Kong historical averages. Last year, the banking industry’s profitability continued to grow, with the overall return on shareholders’ equity increasing for two consecutive years to 13%. Several international banking groups posted strong results in Hong Kong, becoming a significant profit pillar for their groups.

src_raw: 在監管銀行的行為操守方面，金管局在2010年增設銀行操守部，促進銀行公平待客，並加強保障消費者權益。要做到標本兼治，除了訂出各種針對銀行營運基本操守的監管要求外，我們近年來大力推動改革銀行文化，鼓勵銀行循管治、獎勵制度、評估與回饋機制三方面推動穩善文化，務求銀行內部做到上行下效，在根本上恢復、提升客戶對銀行的信任和尊重。繼2017年金管局向全港銀行提供具體的指引，金管局在2018年底進一步推出銀行文化的監管措施，包括要求銀行就企業文化和落實有關措施作出自我評估等，令穩善銀行文化的三大支柱能有效執行。
mt_raw: On the conduct of banks’ behavior, the HKMA established the Banking Conduct Department in 2010 to promote fair treatment of customers and strengthen protection of consumer rights. To achieve both diagnosis and cure, besides setting various regulatory requirements on basic operational conduct, we have actively promoted a culture of stability and goodness in banks, encouraging adherence through governance, reward systems, and assessment and feedback mechanisms. The aim is to foster a top-down effect within banks, restoring and enhancing customer trust and respect. Following specific guidelines issued to all banks in 2017, the HKMA further launched supervisory measures at the end of 2018, including requiring banks to carry out self-assessments on corporate culture and related measures, ensuring the three pillars of a stable and good banking culture are effectively implemented.

src_raw: 雖然互聯網和移動金融是全球趨勢，金管局去年仍繼續促進普及金融，照顧未能應用新科技的社群。例如我們連同香港銀行公會推動便利店推出長者透過「易辦事」免購物提款服務，有關便利店網絡已增至逾300家；我們並聯絡香港郵政在7家主要位於離島和新界的郵政局推出長者提款易服務。銀行業界響應金管局的建議，年內積極增加無障礙設施，提供傷健共融的銀行服務，例子之一是設有聲音導航的自動櫃員機數目一年內增加逾十倍至超過700部。另外，在金管局積極推動下，我們預期將會陸續有銀行在偏遠地區開設更多實體分行和增設流動銀行服務，便利市民。
mt_raw: Although the internet and mobile finance are global trends, the HKMA continued to promote financial inclusion last year, taking care of communities unable to adopt new technologies. For example, together with the Hong Kong Association of Banks, we promoted the "Easy Cash" withdrawal service at convenience stores for the elderly. The network of participating convenience stores has expanded to more than 300 locations. We also coordinated with Hongkong Post to introduce Elderly Cash Withdrawal service at seven major post offices in outlying islands and the New Territories. In response to the HKMA’s recommendations, banks actively increased barrier-free facilities during the year, providing inclusive banking services. One example is the more than tenfold increase in ATMs with voice navigation, now exceeding 700 units. Additionally, under the HKMA’s proactive promotion, more banks are expected to open additional branches and mobile banking services in remote areas, making it easier for citizens to access banking.

src_raw: 金管局與銀行和科技業界緊密合作，在2017年9月啟動「智慧銀行新紀元」，推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為市民帶來嶄新的支付和銀行服務體驗。2018年的亮點，無疑是在9月正式開通的「轉數快」。它是全球獨一無二的零售快速支付系統，打破香港各種電子支付工具和銀行帳戶之間的屏障，讓市民享受全年無休的港元和人民幣即時轉帳服務。金管局還同步推出全球首個「共用二維碼」標準和應用程式，商戶可憑單個二維碼接通多個電子支付系統。「轉數快」推出以來深受市民歡迎，短短半年，登記紀錄已逾258萬個，日均交易量達6萬宗，平均每宗金額分別20,700港元和38,000元人民幣。
mt_raw: The HKMA, in close collaboration with banks and the tech industry, launched the "Smart Banking Era" in September 2017 to promote the development and innovation of financial technology in Hong Kong, providing citizens with a new and innovative payment and banking experience. A major highlight in 2018 was the official launch of Faster Payment System ("FPS") in September. It is a unique retail real-time payment system worldwide, breaking down barriers between various electronic payment tools and bank accounts in Hong Kong, allowing citizens to enjoy 24/7 real-time transfer services in Hong Kong dollars and Renminbi. The HKMA also introduced the world's first “Shared QR Code” standard and application, enabling merchants to connect to multiple electronic payment systems via a single QR code. Since its launch, FPS has been very well received by the public, with over 2.58 million registrations in just six months, daily transaction volume reaching 60,000, with average transaction amounts of HKD 20,700 and Renminbi 38,000 respectively.

src_raw: 去年5月，金管局發出虛擬銀行的認可指引，隨即有33家機構提交虛擬銀行牌照的申請。截至今年四月中，四個牌照已經發出，預期它們將於年內正式投入營運。虛擬銀行有助推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為個人和中小企提供嶄新服務和體驗，並促進普及金融。
mt_raw: Last May, the HKMA issued guidelines on the recognition of virtual banks, and 33 institutions submitted applications for virtual banking licenses. As of mid-April this year, four licenses have been granted, and they are expected to officially commence operations within the year. Virtual banks will facilitate the development and innovation of Hong Kong’s financial technology, offering fresh services and experiences to individuals and SMEs, and promoting financial inclusion.

src_raw: 此外，金管局在7月發布開放應用程式介面(OpenAPI)框架，銀行將分四階段開放產品和服務的對外接口，開創更靈活、更開放的金融科技環境，讓銀行客戶更便捷地整合帳戶資料、獲取資訊，選取貼合自己需要的服務。年內，共有42項新科技產品使用金管局的金融科技監管沙盒進行測試，當中28項完成試行，有關產品和服務已順利推出市場。

Within the year, 42 new technological products used the HKMA’s FinTech supervisory sandbox for testing, among which 28 completed testing and were successfully launched to the market.

src_raw: 香港金融管理局是香港的中央銀行機構，主要職能有4項：在聯繫匯率制度的架構內維持貨幣穩定；促進金融體系（包括銀行體系）的穩定與健全；協助鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位，包括維持與發展香港的金融基建；以及管理外匯基金。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is Hong Kong's central banking institution with four primary functions: maintaining monetary stability within the framework of the linked exchange rate system; promoting the stability and soundness of the financial system, including the banking sector; assisting in consolidating Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre, including maintaining and developing Hong Kong's financial infrastructure; and managing the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金融管理專員的權力、職能及責任由《外匯基金條例》、《銀行業條例》、《金融機構（處置機制）條例》、《存款保障計劃條例》、《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》及其他有關條例明文規定。財政司司長與金融管理專員於2003年6月25日的互換函件，列載彼此在貨幣與金融事務方面的職能與責任的分配，亦披露財政司司長將若干權力轉授金融管理專員。有關函件為公開文件，可於金管局網站查閱。
mt_raw: The powers, functions, and responsibilities of the supervisor of banking are explicitly specified in the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the Banking Ordinance, the Financial Institutions (Dispute Resolution Mechanism) Ordinance, the Deposit Protection Scheme Ordinance, the Payments Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance, and other relevant ordinances. The exchange of correspondence between the Financial Secretary and the supervisor of banking on June 25, 2003, sets out the allocation of responsibilities and functions in monetary and financial affairs, also disclosing the transfer of certain powers to the supervisor. This correspondence is a public document and can be viewed on the HKMA website.

mt_raw: The Exchange Fund is established under the Exchange Fund Ordinance and is controlled by the Financial Secretary. src_raw: 財政司司長負責釐定香港的貨幣政策目標及貨幣體制：財政司司長於2003年6月25日致金融管理專員的函件中，訂明應透過貨幣發行局制度維持貨幣穩定，將港元匯率保持在約7.80港元兌1美元的水平。金融管理專員須自行負責達成貨幣政策目標，包括決定有關的策略、工具及執行方式，並負責維持香港貨幣制度的穩定與健全。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary is responsible for defining Hong Kong’s monetary policy goals and monetary regime. In a letter to the supervisor of banking dated June 25, 2003, the Financial Secretary specified that monetary stability should be maintained through the issue of currency, keeping the Hong Kong dollar's exchange rate around 7.80 HKD to 1 USD. The supervisor of banking must independently achieve monetary policy objectives, including determining related strategies, tools, and implementation methods, and is responsible for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary system.

財政司司長在財經事務及庫務局局長的協助下，負責維持香港金融體系穩定與健全，以及保持香港的國際金融中心地位的政策。為推行這些政策，金融管理專員的職責包括：
- 促進銀行體系的整體穩定與有效運作
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，發展債務市場
- 處理與法定紙幣及硬幣的發行及流通有關的事宜
- 透過發展支付、結算及交收系統，以及在適當情況下負責操作有關系統，促進金融基建的安全與效率
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，促進對香港貨幣及金融體系的信心，並推行適當的發展市場措施，以協助加強香港金融服務的國際競爭力。
mt_raw:
Assisted by the Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, the Financial Secretary is responsible for policies to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s financial system and for keeping Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. To implement these policies, the supervisor of banking’s duties include:
- Promoting the overall stability and effective operation of the banking system
- Collaborating with relevant institutions and organizations to develop the debt market
- Handling issuance and circulation of legal tender notes and coins
- Developing payment, settlement, and clearing systems, and operating these systems when appropriate to ensure the safety and efficiency of financial infrastructure
- Working with other relevant institutions to promote confidence in Hong Kong’s currency and financial system, and to implement appropriate market development measures to enhance Hong Kong’s international financial competitiveness.

terms: {'立法會': 'Legislative Council', '金管局': 'HKMA', '開放': 'liberalisation'}
src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。此外，金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。金管局亦舉辦公眾教育活動，透過講座及資訊中心導賞服務，向公眾人士（特別是學生）講解金管局的工作，以及增進市民的金融知識。有關金管局的傳媒聯繫工作、刊物及公眾教育活動的詳細資料，見「機構職能」一章。
mt_raw: In terms of transparency, the HKMA strives to meet the highest international standards. It maintains extensive contact with the media, publishes various bilingual journals and special publications. Its bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk), features dedicated sections on economic research, statistical data, consumer information, and other topics, as well as publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials issued by the HKMA. Additionally, the HKMA utilizes social media platforms for more effective communication with the public in the digital age. The HKMA’s offices feature a information centre, comprising a library and an exhibition area, open six days a week to the public. It also hosts public education activities, including seminars and guided tours at the information centre, to explain the HKMA’s work, especially to students, and to enhance financial literacy among citizens. Details on HKMA’s media relations, publications, and public education activities can be found in the chapter "Institutional Functions."

mt_raw: The HKMA’s frequency of disclosing information about the Exchange Fund and the note-issuing account has gradually increased and the disclosures have become more detailed. Since 1999, the HKMA has participated in the International Monetary Fund's Special Data Dissemination Standard (SDDS) for central banks. It also publishes minutes of meetings of the Currency Board Sub-Committee within the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, and reports on the operation of the currency issuance system. Since 1996, the HKMA’s website has also included banking supervision policies and guidelines.

src_raw: 財政司司長行使外匯基金的控制權時，會聽取外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。外匯基金諮詢委員會根據《外匯基金條例》第3(1)條成立。該項條文訂明財政司司長行使對外匯基金的控制權時，須諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。財政司司長為外匯基金諮詢委員會的當然主席，其他委員（包括金融管理專員）則以個人身分，由財政司司長根據香港特別行政區行政長官的授權委任。委員因各具專業知識及經驗而獲委任，他們的加入讓外匯基金諮詢委員會廣受裨益。委員的專業知識及經驗涵蓋貨幣、金融、經濟、投資、會計、管理、商業及法律等範疇。
mt_raw: When the Financial Secretary exercises control over the Exchange Fund, he consults the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. The committee was established under section 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance. This section stipulates that the Financial Secretary must consult the committee when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Financial Secretary is the ex officio chair of the committee, with other members (including the supervisor of banking) appointed in their personal capacity by the Financial Secretary under the authority delegated by the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong SAR. Members are appointed for their professional expertise and experience, including in currency, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, business, and law, making the committee highly beneficial.

src_raw: 審核委員會檢討金管局的財政匯報程序，並評核其內部管控制度是否足夠和有效，以及提交報告。審核委員會負責檢視金管局的財務報表，編製該等報表的組成項目與會計原則，並聯同外部及內部審計師查核其審計範疇與結果。審核委員會各委員在金管局並沒有任何行政職能。該委員會在2018年共召開2次會議，並審議風險委員會及內部審核處的工作報告。
mt_raw: The Audit Committee reviews the HKMA’s financial reporting procedures and assesses whether its internal control systems are adequate and effective, as well as preparing reports. The committee reviews the HKMA’s financial statements, the components of those statements, and the accounting principles applied, conducting audits in conjunction with external and internal auditors. Members of the Audit Committee have no executive functions at the HKMA. In 2018, the committee held two meetings, reviewing work reports from the Risk Management Committee and the Internal Audit Department.

src_raw: 2018年香港經濟進一步擴張，不過按年增長速度由第1季的4.6%，逐步減慢至第4季的1.3%（表1），並拖累全年增長率由2017年的3.8%下降至3.0%。經濟擴張轉弱，反映本地需求增長減慢以及經濟持續受淨出口所拖累（圖1）。本地方面，私人消費在第1季強勁增長，但其後增長動力減弱，部分反映貿易保護主義升溫令不明朗因素增加，以及本地資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應。由於營商信心脆弱，整體投資支出的增長速度亦放緩。外圍方面，貨品出口於首3季大致保持平穩，但在第4季隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇而顯著轉差。貨品進口亦因為出口帶動的需求轉弱而放緩。相比之下，服務輸出錄得較快的全年增長，部分是受惠於訪港旅遊業表現蓬勃，而服務輸入則由於運輸、商業及其他服務增長而得以大致維持增長動力。按淨額計，貿易差額由2017年的順差轉為2018年的小幅逆差，並拖累本地經濟增長。
mt_raw: In 2018, Hong Kong’s economy further expanded, but the annual growth rate gradually slowed from 4.6% in the first quarter to 1.3% in the fourth quarter (Table 1), dragging the full-year growth rate down from 3.8% in 2017 to 3.0%. The economic expansion weakened, reflecting slowing local demand growth and continued drag from net exports (Figure 1). Domestically, private consumption grew strongly in the first quarter, but thereafter the growth momentum diminished, partly due to increased uncertainties from rising trade protectionism and asset price adjustments leading to a wealth reduction effect. Due to fragile business confidence, overall investment growth also slowed. In external trade, merchandise exports remained roughly stable in the first three quarters but declined significantly in the fourth quarter amid heightening US-China trade tensions. Merchandise imports also slowed as demand driven by exports weakened. Conversely, service exports registered a faster annual growth, partly benefited from a booming inbound tourism industry, while service imports remained roughly steady amid growth in transportation, business, and other services. On a net basis, the trade surplus turned into a small deficit in 2018 from a surplus in 2017, thereby exerting a drag on the local economy.

src_raw: 主要受到港元與美元負息差下的套息活動所影響，港元兌美元匯率在2018年大致回軟。尤其弱方兌換保證在4月、5月及8月被觸發，促使金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）所定，在7.85港元兌1美元的水平，向銀行購入港元及沽出美元。按照聯匯制度的設計，港元貨幣基礎因而收縮，表示銀行同業流動性減少，再加上市場預期美國加息，導致港元銀行同業拆息整體上升。由於銀行體系資金成本上升，銀行於9月下旬在美國聯邦基金利率目標區間上調後，調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。信貸增長方面，部分由於本地經濟增長放緩以及對外貿易表現轉弱，整體銀行貸款的增幅由2017年的16.1%，顯著減慢至2018年的4.4%。
mt_raw: Mainly impacted by the carry trade activities driven by negative interest rate differentials between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, the HKD/USD exchange rate generally depreciated in 2018. Notably, the weak-side exchange guarantee was triggered in April, May, and August, prompting the HKMA to buy HKD and sell USD at the linked exchange rate of 7.85 HKD per USD as stipulated under the Linked Exchange Rate System. Under this system’s design, the Hong Kong dollar monetary base contracted, indicating a reduction in interbank liquidity, while market expectations of US rate hikes caused overall Hong Kong dollar interbank lending rates to rise. As the cost of funds for banks increased, after the federal funds rate target range was raised in late September, banks also increased their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points. Regarding credit growth, due to the slowing of the local economy and weaker external trade performance, the overall increase in bank loans significantly decelerated from 16.1% in 2017 to 4.4% in 2018.

src_raw: 通脹壓力於2018年略為增加。剔除政府一次性紓緩措施的影響後，基本通脹率由2017年的1.7%低位，升至2018年的2.6%，不過仍屬於溫和水平。當中的住屋租金組成項目增幅較快，反映較早前新簽訂私人住宅租金上升的影響（圖2）。更廣泛的分析顯示，名義勞工成本及商用物業租金增長略為加快，令本地成本壓力更趨明顯。隨着香港部分主要進口來源地通脹上升，進口價格通脹亦因而攀升。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressures increased slightly in 2018. After excluding the impact of one-off government relief measures, the core inflation rate rose from 1.7% in 2017 to 2.6% in 2018, remaining at a mild level. Among the components, housing rental prices increased more rapidly, reflecting the earlier rise in new private residential rents (Figure 2). Broader analysis indicated that growth in nominal labor costs and commercial property rents also accelerated slightly, making local cost pressures more apparent. As inflation rose in key source countries of imports, import price inflation also increased accordingly.

src_raw: 勞工市場狀況在2018年保持穩健（圖3）。失業率由2017年全年的3.1%下降至2018年的2.8%，是自1997年以來的最低水平。當中大部分主要服務行業的失業率都有所回落，特別是住宿及膳食服務業的跌幅更為顯著。隨着總就業人數及私營機構職位空缺進一步增加，整體勞工需求持續增強，而且勞動人口參與率亦輕微上升。在勞工市場狀況趨緊下，實質工資及收入進一步增加。
mt_raw: The labour market remained resilient in 2018 (Figure 3). The unemployment rate declined from 3.1% for the whole of 2017 to 2.8% in 2018, the lowest since 1997. Unemployment in most major service industries also fell, especially in accommodation and food services. As total employment and vacancies in private sector increased further, overall labour demand continued to strengthen, while the labour force participation rate slightly rose. With tightening labour market conditions, real wages and incomes further increased.

src_raw: 香港股市走勢在2018年大幅逆轉。恒生指數在2017年強勁的上升動力帶動下，於2018年1月升上33,484點的歷史高位（圖4）。然而，隨着主要中央銀行收緊貨幣政策、中美貿易摩擦加劇及本地經濟增長放緩引起投資者的憂慮，市場的樂觀情緒急劇逆轉。恒生指數在10月下挫至24,586點的低位，在年底則收報25,846點，較一年前下跌13.6%。然而，平均每日成交額則由2017年的882億港元上升至1,074億港元，本港首次公開招股集資總額亦因數間從事新興及創科產業的企業上市而大幅增加。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s stock market saw a sharp reversal in 2018. Driven by a strong upward momentum in the Hang Seng Index in 2017, it reached a historical high of 33,484 points in January 2018 (Figure 4). However, concerns among investors increased due to tightening monetary policies by major central banks, escalating US-China trade tensions, and slowing domestic growth, resulting in a rapid deterioration of market sentiment. The Hang Seng Index fell to a low of 24,586 in October, and ended the year at 25,846, down 13.6% from a year earlier. Nonetheless, the average daily trading volume increased from HKD 88.2 billion in 2017 to HKD 107.4 billion, and the total proceeds from the initial public offerings in Hong Kong surged significantly due to listings of companies engaged in emerging and innovative industries.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2018年上半年保持暢旺，不過在下半年隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇、環球股市調整及本港最優惠利率上升而有所降溫。整體樓價在7月至12月期間由高位回落9%，然而全年計仍錄得2%的升幅（圖4）。由於一手及二手市場的買賣活動於下半年顯著減少，所以物業成交量在2018年亦較前一年下跌7%至57,247宗。此外，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊，樓價與收入比率以及收入槓桿比率分別為17.0及75.7，兩者均遠高於長期平均水平。另一方面，非住宅物業價格在2018年整體上升，惟接近年底時稍見回落。全年計，價格及租金均進一步上升，租金回報率則維持在低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market remained buoyant in the first half of 2018 but cooled in the second half amid escalating US-China trade tensions, adjustments in global equities, and rising prime lending rates. Overall housing prices fell by 9% from the peak between July and December; however, they still recorded an overall increase of 2% for the year (Figure 4). Due to a significant decline in transactions in both primary and secondary markets in the second half, property transaction volume dropped by 7% to 57,247 cases compared with the previous year. Furthermore, housing affordability remained tight, with the price-to-income ratio and mortgage-to-income ratio at 17.0 and 75.7 respectively, both well above long-term averages. Meanwhile, prices of non-residential properties generally increased in 2018 but showed some decline towards the end of the year. Overall, prices and rents rose further, with rental yields remaining at low levels.

src_raw: 由於全球經濟增長放緩，預期2019年香港經濟增長將會減慢。尤其外圍環境充滿挑戰，預期香港出口表現仍會受壓。本地方面，雖然失業率低企及家庭收入增加將繼續支撐私人消費，但部分由於消費信心減弱及較早前的資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應的影響，預期私人消費增長步伐會放緩。固定資本形成方面，雖然隨着房屋供應增加，樓宇及建造活動應會穩步增長，但面對經濟不明朗因素增加，企業對於資本投資可能會變得更為審慎。政府預測2019年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎2至3%之間，私營機構分析員的最新預測增幅則平均為2.3%。
mt_raw: Given the global slowdown, Hong Kong’s economic growth in 2019 is expected to slow down. External challenges such as trade tensions and uncertainties regarding US monetary policy are expected to continue weighing on Hong Kong’s exports. Domestically, despite low unemployment and rising household incomes supporting private consumption, weaker consumer confidence and wealth diminishment caused by earlier asset price adjustments may slow private consumption growth. While increased housing supply is expected to support steady growth in construction and property activities, heightened economic uncertainties could lead firms to adopt a more cautious stance on capital investment. The government projects real GDP growth for 2019 to be between 2% and 3%, with private sector analysts’ latest forecasts averaging around 2.3%.

src_raw: 由於包括香港在內的全球增長放緩，外圍物價及本地成本壓力或會得到紓緩，因此預期通脹壓力在2019年仍保持溫和。近期新簽訂住宅租金回落，亦會對通脹產生壓抑作用。市場共識預測2019年整體通脹率為2.2%，政府預期基本通脹率則為2.5%。預期在經濟持續增長及訪港旅遊業維持暢旺下，勞工市場狀況會繼續偏緊。私營機構分析員預計失業率於2019年會維持於約3%的水平。
mt_raw: Due to the global slowdown, including that of Hong Kong, external price pressures and domestic cost pressures are expected to be kept in check, maintaining moderate inflation in 2019. Recent declines in new private rental prices will also help suppress inflation. Consensus among market participants forecasts a 2019 overall inflation rate of 2.2%, while the government’s estimate for core inflation is 2.5%. With continued economic growth and sustained inbound tourism, the labour market is expected to remain tight. Private sector analysts forecast the unemployment rate to stay around 3% in 2019.

src_raw: 2018年銀行體系繼續穩步增長，資產負債表擴大5.9%。面對經濟不明朗因素持續，例如主要經濟體之間的貿易衝突及加息等，企業在獲取新貸款方面變得較為保守。年內貸款總額增幅放緩至4.4%，而2017年為16.1%。有關增長受在香港使用的貸款（+6.5%）及在香港境外使用的貸款（+2%）同告增加帶動。另一方面，由於環球貿易環境不明朗，貿易融資下跌7.6%。中國內地相關貸款的增長亦由2017年的17.5%放緩至2018年的1.4%。
mt_raw: In 2018, the banking sector continued to grow steadily, with a 5.9% expansion of the balance sheet. Facing ongoing uncertainties such as trade conflicts and rate hikes among major economies, firms became more cautious about obtaining new loans. The total loan volume growth slowed markedly from 16.1% in 2017 to 4.4% in 2018. The expansion was mainly driven by loans used within Hong Kong (+6.5%) and those used outside Hong Kong (+2%). Conversely, trade finance declined by 7.6%, amid uncertain global trade environment. Growth in loans related to Mainland China also slowed from 17.5% in 2017 to 1.4% in 2018.

src_raw: 就負債方而言，存款總額在2018年增加5%，較2017年（+8.7%）的增幅小。由於預期美國持續加息，部分銀行上調定期存款利率，吸引存戶將往來及儲蓄存款轉為定期存款，從而鎖定資金。往來及儲蓄存款佔存款總額的比例由對上一年的57.4%，降至2018年底的51.4%，導致資金成本上升。由於存款總額的增長較貸款總額快，整體貸存比率由2017年底的73%稍降至2018年底的72.6%（圖5）。
mt_raw: On the liabilities side, total deposits increased by 5% in 2018, slower than the 8.7% expansion in 2017. Anticipating continued US rate hikes, some banks raised fixed deposit rates, attracting depositors to shift current and savings accounts into fixed deposits to lock in funds. The proportion of demand and savings deposits as a share of total deposits decreased from 57.4% in the previous year to 51.4% at the end of 2018, leading to higher funding costs. As the growth rate of total deposits outpaced that of total loans, the loan-to-deposit ratio slightly declined from 73% at the end of 2017 to 72.6% at year-end (Figure 5).

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s main monetary policy objective is to maintain monetary stability by ensuring the stability of the HKD exchange rate, so that the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate against the US dollar remains within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 HKD per USD in the foreign exchange market. The currency system mainly adopts a Currency Board system, which stipulates that US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100% support for the monetary base; when the monetary base changes, the US dollar reserves must also increase or decrease correspondingly, maintaining a 100% match with the change in the monetary base.

- 負債證明書（為3間發鈔銀行發行的銀行紙幣提供十足支持）

mt_raw:
The monetary base (Table 1) includes:
- Notes of deposit certificates (which fully support banknotes issued by three note-issuing banks)
- Circulating banknotes and coins issued by the government
- The total balance of the banking sector’s settlement accounts held at the Monetary Authority (i.e., the aggregate balance)
- Foreign exchange fund bills and bonds issued by the Monetary Authority on behalf of the government.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The Monetary Authority maintains the stability of the HKD exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to mantener the exchange guarantee. If market demand for HKD exceeds supply, causing the exchange rate to strengthen to the strong-side exchange guarantee rate of 7.75 HKD per USD, the Monetary Authority will sell HKD and buy USD from banks, increasing the aggregate balance and reducing HKD interest rates, thereby restoring the HKD exchange rate within the 7.75 to 7.85 range. Conversely, if HKD supply exceeds demand, causing the exchange rate to weaken to the weak-side exchange guarantee rate of 7.85 HKD per USD, the Authority will buy HKD, reducing the aggregate balance and pushing up HKD interest rates, restoring the exchange rate within the exchange rate range.

src_raw: 在港元與美元負息差擴闊帶動套息活動的背景下，港元匯率自年初以來逐步轉弱。於4月12日，弱方兌換保證在2005年訂於7.85水平以來首度被觸發。全年計，弱方兌換保證在2018年合共被觸發27次，分別在4月被觸發13次，5月6次，以及8月8次。儘管如此，港元交易仍然暢順有序，港元匯率於4月中至9月中在弱方兌換保證匯率7.85附近徘徊（圖1）。其後港元匯率略為轉強，部分反映假期、季結及年結臨近，銀行同業流動性收緊，帶動部分套息交易平倉。同時，某程度上港元亦受到11月初股市氣氛好轉支持。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2018年全年正常運作。
mt_raw: Against the background of a widening interest differential between HKD and USD, which drove carry trade activities, the HKD exchange rate gradually weakened from the start of the year. On April 12, the weak-side exchange guarantee was triggered for the first time since being set at 7.85 in 2005. Throughout the year, the weak-side exchange guarantee was triggered 27 times in total: 13 times in April, 6 times in May, and 8 times in August. Despite this, HKD trading remained smooth and orderly, with the HKD exchange rate hovering around the weak-side guarantee level of 7.85 from mid-April to mid-September (Figure 1). Subsequently, the HKD exchange rate slightly strengthened, partly reflecting the approaching holiday, quarter-end, and year-end, as well as tightened banking liquidity, which led to some carry trade unwinding. Meanwhile, the HKD was also supported to some extent by improved stock market sentiment in early November. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2018.

src_raw: 由於弱方兌換保證被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2017年底的12,268億港元，下降至2018年底的11,362億港元（圖2）。年內，金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率7.85的水平，購入合共1,035億港元，總結餘因而由2017年底的1,798億港元下降至2018年底的764億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額沒有明顯變動。貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: Due to the triggering of the weak-side exchange guarantee, the aggregate balance and the total amount of outstanding foreign exchange fund bills and bonds decreased from HKD 1,226.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 1,136.2 billion at the end of 2018 (Figure 2). During the year, under the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the Monetary Authority purchased a total of HKD 103.5 billion at the weak-side exchange guarantee rate of 7.85 upon banks’ requests, causing the aggregate balance to fall from HKD 1,798 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 764 billion at the end of 2018. The total outstanding foreign exchange fund bills and bonds remained relatively unchanged during the year. The monetary base continued to be fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 由於觸發弱方兌換保證後銀行同業流動性減少，以及市場預期美國加息，香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內普遍上升。受新股集資活動相關的資金需求增加及季節性流動資金需求帶動，短期銀行同業拆息更出現較大波幅（圖3）。整體而言，短期銀行同業拆息在2018年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。鑑於銀行體系資金成本上升，在9月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調後，銀行調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。
mt_raw: Following the triggering of the weak-side exchange guarantee and the reduction in bank liquidity, as well as market expectations of US rate hikes, interbank interest rates in Hong Kong generally increased in 2018. Increased demand for funds related to new share issuances and seasonal liquidity needs caused significant fluctuations in short-term interbank rates (Figure 3). Overall, short-term interbank interest rates remained below the base rate for most of 2018. In response to rising funding costs in the banking system, after the Federal Reserve raised its target federal funds rate range in late September, banks also increased their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points.

src_raw: 因應年內美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍4次合共上調100基點，由1.25至1.50厘上調至2.25至2.50厘，基本利率於3月22日、6月14日、9月27日及12月20日合共上調100基點，由1.75厘上調至2.75厘。基本利率的調整是按照2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，以兩者中較高者為準。
mt_raw: In line with the four hikes of the US federal funds rate target range totaling 100 basis points to 2.25-2.50% from 1.25-1.50%, the base rate was adjusted upwards four times on March 22, June 14, September 27, and December 20, a total increase of 100 basis points from 1.75% to 2.75%. These adjustments are made according to a revised formula announced on March 26, 2009, whereby the base rate is set at the lower end of the US federal funds rate target range plus 50 basis points, or the five-day moving average of the 1-month and overnight HKD interbank rates, whichever is higher.

mt_raw: The HKD forward rate discount widened during the first four months, largely following the trend of the HKD/USD interest rate differential, with the 12-month forward points reaching -620 points in mid-April (Figure 4). Subsequently, as the interest differential narrowed, the forward discount slightly reduced, before widening again in the fourth quarter. Overall, the Hong Kong monetary market continued to operate normally. Discount window lending increased from HKD 10.3 billion in 2017 to HKD 40.2 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 聯匯制度自1983年實施以來，直是維持香港貨幣及金融穩定的重要基石；並在多次區內以至全球金融危機考驗下，展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。由於港元轉弱，作為聯匯制度設計一部分的弱方兌換保證於4月、5月及8月被多次觸發。資金流出港元，是香港利率正常化的必經過程，亦是聯匯制度下的正常運作。為增進各界對有關操作及聯匯制度機制的了解，金管局致力向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並展示香港金融體系應對衝擊的能力。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府的承擔，以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行2018年第四條磋商時，重申對聯匯制度的支持，並指出聯匯制度仍然是最適合香港的貨幣制度，是維持穩定的支柱，有助確保經濟持續增長、維持競爭力及促進龐大的金融服務業暢順運作。
mt_raw: Since the implementation of the Linked Exchange Rate System in 1983, it has been an important cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability; it has repeatedly demonstrated resilience during regional and global financial crises. As the HKD weakened, the part of the system that includes the weak-side exchange guarantee was triggered multiple times in April, May, and August. Capital outflows from HKD are a natural part of the normalization process of Hong Kong interest rates and an expected operation within the framework of the Linked Exchange Rate System. To enhance public understanding of the operational mechanisms of the system, the Monetary Authority actively explains the technical details of the system and demonstrates Hong Kong’s capacity to cope with shocks. The government remains committed to maintaining the system. The foreign exchange and monetary markets remained stable, further reinforcing public confidence in the government’s commitment and the HKD’s role as a means of payment and store of value. During the 2018 Article IV consultation, the International Monetary Fund reaffirmed its support for the Linked Exchange Rate System, stating that it remains the most suitable currency arrangement for Hong Kong, serving as the backbone of stability, supporting ongoing economic growth, maintaining competitiveness, and facilitating the smooth operation of the vast financial sector.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行的企業、物業相關及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力。銀行持有大量外匯基金票據及債券，可經貼現窗用作換取港元流動資金，為利率大幅波動的情況提供有效緩衝。金管局隨時準備透過調整外匯基金票據及債券的發行量以提供額外流動性，以應對資金可能急劇流出港元的情況。金管局亦提醒市民審慎管理市場及利率風險，並為可能出現的市場波動作好準備。
mt_raw: Given the crucial role of a sound banking system for the normal operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the Monetary Authority continues to closely monitor banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress test results, while maintaining supervision of banks’ corporate, property-related, and Mainland-related lending to ensure the banking system’s resilience. Banks hold large amounts of foreign exchange fund bills and bonds, which can be used through the discount window to obtain HKD liquidity, providing an effective buffer against significant interest rate volatility. The Monetary Authority is prepared to adjust the issuance of foreign exchange fund bills and bonds to supply additional liquidity as needed to address potential rapid outflows of funds in HKD. Moreover, the Authority reminds the public to prudently manage market and interest rate risks and to prepare for potential market fluctuations.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2018年在107.8至109.9%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日為109.9%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: To increase the transparency of the Currency Board account, since October 1998, part of the foreign exchange reserves have been designated to support the monetary base. The support ratio (the proportion of supporting assets relative to the monetary base) fluctuated between 107.8% and 109.9% in 2018, without reaching either upper or lower limits. On December 31, 2018, the ratio was 109.9% (Figure 5). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although some foreign exchange reserves have been designated as part of the support portfolio, all assets of the Fund are available to back the HKD exchange rate. The vast financial resources of the foreign exchange reserves form a strong backing in the face of sudden shocks, helping to safeguard Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（貨幣發行委員會）負責監察和探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2018年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括多國央行聯合退出非常規貨幣政策對在香港的境外銀行美元貸款供應造成的潛在影響、港元貨幣需求的利率敏感度，以及聯匯制度自3項優化措施以來的運作機制及理論。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board under the Foreign Exchange Fund Advisory Committee monitors and discusses issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2018, topics included the potential impact of multilateral central bank exit strategies from unconventional monetary policies on offshore USD loans in Hong Kong, the interest rate sensitivity of HKD currency demand, and operational and theoretical aspects of the system since the implementation of the three optimizations. Minutes of meetings and the reports on the operation of the Currency Board system submitted by the Monetary Authority are available on the Authority’s website.

src_raw: 香港金融研究中心（研究中心）繼續支持貨幣政策、銀行業及金融範疇的研究工作。過去4年，研究中心更着重政策方面的研究，從所舉辦的研討會及訪問學者計劃尤其可見一斑。一方面，研究中心與主要中央銀行及政策研究機構合作，聯合舉辦更多政策相關的研討會。另一方面，在2016年推出專題研究學者計劃，支持更多與金管局政策制定相關的研究項目。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (Research Center) continues to support research on monetary policy, banking, and finance. Over the past four years, the Research Center has increasingly focused on policy-related studies, evident in its seminars and visiting scholar programs. It collaborates with major central banks and policy research institutions to co-host more policy-related seminars. Additionally, since launching the Focused Scholar Program in 2016, the Center supports more research projects linked to the Policy Formulation of the Monetary Authority.

src_raw:
在2018年，研究中心合共邀請16位研究學者到訪，並發表了25份研究論文。年內研究中心亦舉辦了4場國際研討會：
- 於1月舉行的「第9屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國房地產市場及其對經濟與金融穩定的影響」。研討會由研究中心、國務院發展研究中心市場經濟研究所及中國人民銀行金融研究所合辦，集中討論內地房地產市場相關的課題及風險。
- 於10月舉行由金管局及國際結算銀行合辦的「匯率與貨幣政策框架」研討會。研討會為國際結算銀行於香港的亞太區辦事處成立20周年的慶祝活動之一，旨在探討匯率在貨幣政策框架中的角色。
- 於11月舉行的「2018年中央銀行金融市場微結構的年度研討會」。研討會討論金融市場微結構理論研究、實證研究結果及近期發展相關的政策影響。
- 於11月舉行由金管局、歐洲中央銀行及美國聯邦儲備委員會合辦的「中國經濟的新時代」中國專家網絡研討會。研討會討論內地經濟正面對的迫切問題及其對全球經濟的影響，並特別着重與中央銀行決策者相關的政策議題。這是中國專家網絡研討會首次在歐洲以外地區舉行。
mt_raw:
In 2018, the Research Center hosted 16 visiting scholars, who published 25 research papers. During the year, four international conferences were held:
- The 9th Annual China Economic Conference in January, themed “China’s Real Estate Market and Its Impact on Economic and Financial Stability.” Co-organized with the Development Research Center of the State Council and the Financial Research Institute of the People’s Bank of China, focusing on real estate-related issues and risks in mainland China.
- In October, a conference on "Exchange Rate and Monetary Policy Framework," co-organized with the Bank for International Settlements (BIS), celebrating the 20th anniversary of the BIS’s Asia-Pacific Office in Hong Kong. The conference explored the role of exchange rates within monetary policy frameworks.
- The “2018 Annual Conference on Microstructure in Central Bank Financial Markets” held in November discussed theories, empirical findings, and policy implications related to financial market microstructure.
- Also in November, a China Expert Network Seminar titled “A New Era for China’s Economy,” co-hosted by the Monetary Authority, BIS, and the Federal Reserve, discussed key challenges facing mainland China’s economy and their global impacts, with particular emphasis on policy issues relevant to central bank decision-makers. This was the first China Expert Network Seminar held outside Europe.

src_raw: 儘管環球經濟及金融市場的不確定性增加，2018年香港銀行體系維持穩健。認可機構的流動性及信用風險管理制度的成效繼續是金管局年內的監管重點。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加，以及銀行業更廣泛使用金融科技，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及業務操作恢復能力的監管。金管局亦於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本，並開始處理虛擬銀行認可申請。在操守監管方面，金管局採取進一步措施，加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法、促進為殘疾人士提供無障礙銀行服務，以及推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: Despite increasing uncertainties in the global economy and financial markets, Hong Kong's banking system remained resilient in 2018. The effectiveness of the liquidity and credit risk management systems of licensed institutions continued to be a key supervisory focus for the HKMA during the year. Given the ongoing proliferation of cyber threats and the wider adoption of financial technology by banks, the HKMA enhanced its supervision of technological risk management and business continuity resilience of licensed institutions. The HKMA also issued a revised guideline for "Recognition of Virtual Banks" in May and began processing applications for virtual bank recognition. In terms of conduct regulation, the HKMA took further measures to strengthen the supervision of sales practices for investment and insurance products, promote barrier-free banking services for persons with disabilities, and encourage a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 隨着金融罪行越趨複雜及全球化，金管局繼續借助新科技及風險為本方法，加強香港打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力。金管局在香港落實國際監管標準方面進展理想，其中包括資本充足標準、披露標準、流動性標準及大額風險承擔限額。此外，金管局亦加強與銀行業的溝通接觸，確保在監管成效與市場發展兩者間取得適當平衡。
mt_raw: As financial crimes become increasingly sophisticated and globalized, the HKMA continues to leverage new technology and a risk-based approach to bolster Hong Kong's response capabilities to money laundering and terrorist financing. The HKMA's progress in implementing international supervisory standards in Hong Kong is encouraging, including capital adequacy standards, disclosure standards, liquidity standards, and large exposure limits. Furthermore, the HKMA has intensified its communication with banks to ensure an appropriate balance is maintained between regulatory effectiveness and market development.

src_raw: 銀行可能因其營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、對危機作出應對，並自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may pose risks to the stability of the banking system through their operations, or in extreme cases, through disorderly insolvency. As a regulatory authority, the HKMA plays a critical role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring banks' capability to withstand shocks, respond to crises, and recover to normal operations, ultimately helping to prevent insolvencies. The HKMA is responsible for prudent supervision of banks and for recognizing licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively “licensed institutions”) in Hong Kong. The HKMA also oversees designated infrastructure related to certain financial markets.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦非為了確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，即能有序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員於該機制之下作為包括認可機構在內的若干金融機構的處置機制當局。為建立運作暢順的香港處置機制，必須制定處置法例及政策標準、進行處置規劃以清除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置無法經營的認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局需要採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the HKMA cannot guarantee a risk-free financial system, nor was the prudential regulatory framework in Hong Kong designed to eliminate all risks. As a resolution authority, the HKMA strives to ensure that, when a licensed institution becomes unsustainable, an orderly resolution can be executed. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution mechanism under which the HKMA serves as a resolution authority for a number of financial institutions, including licensed institutions. To develop a smoothly functioning resolution mechanism, it is necessary to formulate resolution legislation and policy standards, plan resolutions to eliminate barriers to resolution for licensed institutions, and build operational capabilities for HKMA to manage failures of licensed institutions. To effectively carry out these tasks, the HKMA adopts an approach aligned with international standards and coordinated frameworks.

src_raw: 金管局在2018年共進行187次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務操作及風險管理，以及認可機構應對金融科技發展的業務策略。為繼續加強認可機構的風險管治水平，金管局與認可機構董事局或董事局轄下委員會共舉行27次會議，並跟進認可機構實施企業管治指引的進度。此外，金管局與認可機構及其外聘核數師共舉行28次三方聯席會議。
mt_raw: In 2018, the HKMA conducted a total of 187 off-site reviews, covering a broad scope including CAMEL ratings, corporate governance, business operations, risk management of licensed institutions, and their strategies on adapting to financial technology developments. To further strengthen the risk governance level of licensed institutions, the HKMA held 27 meetings with the boards of licensed institutions or their relevant committees and followed up on the implementation progress of corporate governance guidelines. Additionally, the HKMA held 28 tripartite meetings with licensed institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行392次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查與評估的主要重點。其他重點為科技風險及業務操作風險管理，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集管控措施。金管局亦增加針對流動性與市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足架構的實施情況的現場審查及專題評估次數。專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: Beyond off-site reviews, the HKMA continued regular onsite examinations and conducted focused assessments targeting higher-risk areas. During the year, 392 onsite reviews and special assessments were carried out, with the primary focus on credit risk management. Other priorities included technology risk and operational risk management, as well as anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing controls. The HKMA also increased onsite examinations and assessments related to liquidity and market risk management, as well as the implementation of the Basel capital adequacy framework. Dedicated review teams also conducted on-site inspections on licensed institutions’ securities, investment products, insurance, and MPF businesses.

src_raw: 住宅物業價格在2018年7月到達歷史高位，但在下半年出現緩和跡象。金管局自2009年10月以來推出的8輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已增強香港銀行體系應對本港樓市可能逆轉的抵禦能力。新造住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數由2009年9月金管局推出首輪逆周期措施前的64%，降至2018年12月的46%。平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時的41%，降至2018年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Residential property prices reached historic highs in July 2018 but showed signs of easing in the second half of the year. Since October 2009, the HKMA has introduced eight macroprudential countercyclical measures to strengthen Hong Kong’s resilience against potential reversals in the local housing market. The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio for new residential mortgages decreased from 64% prior to the first macroprudential measure introduced in September 2009 to 46% by December 2018. src_raw: 銀行業面對的科技風險仍然偏高。金管局於2016年推出「網絡防衛評估框架」。第一期實施安排涵蓋包括所有大型銀行在內的30間認可機構，該等認可機構已完成3個階段的評估，即自身風險程度評估、成熟程度評估及（如適用）風險資訊主導網絡攻防模擬測試。有關評估有助認可機構查找需要改進的運作範疇及採取補救措施，加強網絡防衛。與此同時，金管局已制定第二及第三期實施安排的時間表，這兩期實施安排將涵蓋其餘認可機構。年內金管局進行現場審查，集中檢視認可機構的網絡保安管控措施、外判安排及資訊科技管治。
mt_raw: The technology risk faced by the banking industry remains high. In 2016, the HKMA launched the "Cyber Resilience Evaluation Framework." Phase 1 implementation covered 30 licensed institutions, including all major banks, which completed three assessment stages: self-assessment of risk levels, maturity assessment, and, where applicable, testing of cyber threat detection and response using risk information-led simulations. This evaluation helps licensed institutions identify operational gaps and implement remedial actions to enhance cyber defenses. The HKMA has also developed timelines for the second and third phases of implementation, which will include the remaining licensed institutions. During the year, onsite reviews focused on cyber security controls, outsourcing arrangements, and information technology governance.

src_raw: 金管局繼續就2017年9月公布的7項推動智慧銀行的措施與銀行業合作，以促進金融科技在香港的發展。在監管層面，金管局於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本。此外，金管局在「銀行易」措施下，已經精簡有關遙距開戶、網上貸款及網上財富管理的監管要求。這些優化的監管要求有助銀行提供更佳的網上銀行用戶體驗。「銀行易」措施的工作範疇在9月擴大至促進銀行採用金融合規科技(Regtech)，而當中3個新的工作重點包括打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監察科技、用於審慎風險管理和合規的金融合規科技，以及「機器可讀」的監管要求。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to collaborate with the banking industry on seven measures announced in September 2017 to promote the development of smart banking in Hong Kong. In the supervisory domain, the HKMA revised the guideline on "Recognition of Virtual Banks" in May. Under the "BankingPlus" initiative, the HKMA streamlined supervisory requirements for remote account opening, online lending, and online wealth management services. These regulatory adjustments help banks provide better online banking user experiences. In September, the scope of "BankingPlus" was expanded to include promoting the adoption of regtech solutions for compliance and risk management. Three new focus areas include regtech solutions for anti-money laundering and countering terrorist financing, regtech for prudential risk management and compliance, and machine-readable regulatory requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國貨幣政策持續正常化，金管局加強了流動性風險的監管，以確保認可機構審慎及有效地管理其流動性風險。年內金管局進行了一輪專題評估，以評估認可機構為美元流動性可能收緊所作的準備，以及其內部流動性壓力測試的能力。此外，金管局亦監察認可機構遵守於1月生效的「穩定資金淨額比率」要求的情況。
mt_raw: With the continuation of the normalization of US monetary policy, the HKMA intensified its liquidity risk supervision to ensure licensed institutions prudently and effectively manage their liquidity risks. During the year, the HKMA conducted a focused assessment to review preparedness for potential tightening of US dollar liquidity and the internal liquidity stress testing capabilities of licensed institutions. Additionally, the HKMA monitored compliance with the "Net Stable Funding Ratio" requirement that became effective in January.

src_raw: 政府於4月發表的《香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估報告》指出，香港銀行體系面對高洗錢威脅，這與其他國際金融中心一樣，亦反映金融服務日趨全球化及複雜。香港面對的洗錢威脅除源自本地犯罪活動外，在更大程度上也來自境外活動。該等境外活動包括來自境外貪污活動的非法得益、跨國犯罪集團的詐騙活動、逃稅及基於香港作為支付及貿易樞紐的地位而引致與制裁相關的風險。在金管局協助下，政府制定打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策聲明，列載對該等威脅的回應，目標是在提高打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力的同時，又能吸引及便利正當企業。
mt_raw: The government issued the "Hong Kong Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment Report" in April, which highlighted that the Hong Kong banking system faces high threats from money laundering, reflecting the increasing globalization and complexity of financial services. The threats are mainly from overseas activities, including proceeds of overseas corruption, cross-border fraud, tax evasion, and risks related to sanctions due to Hong Kong’s role as a payment and trade hub. With the HKMA’s assistance, the government established policies to combat money laundering and terrorist financing, responding to these threats while also enabling legitimate businesses to operate and expand.

src_raw: 《2018年打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（金融機構）（修訂）條例》於3月1日生效，引入的修訂包括在核實客戶身分方面賦予靈活性，以配合認可機構利用科技方便客戶開戶的發展。新法例亦擴大適用範圍，規定律師、會計師、地產代理及信託或公司服務提供者須負上打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的責任，從而全面強化打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度。該等修訂連同《公司條例》為提高企業實益擁有權透明度而作出的修訂，有助認可機構執行打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面的工作。
mt_raw: The amended "Anti-Money Laundering and Countering Terrorist Financing (Financial Institutions) (Amendment) Ordinance" became effective on March 1, 2018. The amendments introduce flexibility in customer identity verification to facilitate the adoption of technological solutions by licensed institutions. The law also expands scope to require lawyers, accountants, property agents, and trust or company service providers to assume responsibilities in anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing efforts, thereby strengthening the overall system. These modifications, along with the revisions to the "Companies Ordinance" to enhance transparency of beneficial ownership, support licensed institutions’ anti-money laundering initiatives.

src_raw:
- 成功推出快速支付系統「轉數快」，全面接通不同銀行及儲值支付工具（統稱「電子錢包」）
- 發布銀行業開放應用程式介面（開放API）框架及促進業界落實開放API；
- 提升金融科技研究及人才培訓；
- 加強跨境金融科技合作；

- 擴展「銀行易」以促進銀行採用金融合規科技。
mt_raw:
- Successful launch of the Faster Payment System "FPS", connecting multiple banks and stored-value payment tools (collectively known as "electronic wallets") for real-time cross-bank funds transfer in Hong Kong dollars and renminbi.
- Publication of the Banking Industry Open API Framework and facilitation of industry implementation of open APIs.
- Enhancement of fintech research and talent training.
- Strengthening cross-border fintech cooperation.
- Revision of the "Guideline on Approval of Virtual Banks" and processing virtual bank licence applications.
- Upgraded operations of the "Fintech Supervisory Sandbox" (FSS 2.0) for smooth operation.
- Expansion of the "Banking Connect" platform to promote the adoption of fintech compliance solutions by banks.

src_raw: 隨着中國內地與香港資本市場的互聯互通計劃優化措施的落實，香港作為進入中國內地主要門戶的獨特地位進一步加強。「債券通」全面實施即時貨銀兩訖(DvP)結算模式及國務院宣布境外投資者投資中國境內債券市場的稅務寛免安排，進一步提升計劃的效率及吸引力。金管局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討及實施多項金融配套措施，便利在粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）生活、工作及營商的個人和企業。香港離岸人民幣業務繼續蓬勃發展，人民幣存款資金池全年上升6%至6,577億元人民幣；人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額達到10,101億元人民幣的高水平。
mt_raw: With the realisation of optimisation measures for the connectivity between the mainland China and Hong Kong capital markets, Hong Kong’s status as a key entry point into mainland China is further reinforced. The implementation of the Bond Connect scheme with real-time DvP (delivery versus payment) settlement and the State Council’s announcement of tax exemption arrangements for offshore investors investing in mainland China’s bond market enhances the scheme’s efficiency and attractiveness. Additionally, the HKMA works closely with mainland authorities to explore and implement various financial supporting measures to facilitate individuals and enterprises living, working, and doing business in the Greater Bay Area. Hong Kong’s offshore renminbi business continues to flourish, with renminbi deposits rising by 6% year-on-year to RMB 65.77 billion; the daily average transaction value of the RTGS system in renminbi reached a high level of RMB 1,010.1 billion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓進一步提升香港金融平台競爭力的新機會。為促進香港債券市場的發展，金管局落實《財政預算案》所提出的「債券資助先導計劃」，為首次在香港發行債券的機構提供資助，並與政府緊密合作修訂法例，擴大「合資格債務票據計劃」下可獲稅務豁免的債券投資收入範圍。金管局亦加強市場推廣活動，向海外及內地持份者宣傳香港的優勢，包括舉辦多項大型及專題外展活動推廣香港為綠色金融、基建融資及企業財資中心樞紐。
mt_raw: The HKMA is actively exploring new opportunities to further boost the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. To promote the development of the Hong Kong bond market, the HKMA implemented the "Bond Funding Pilot Scheme" as proposed in the Budget, providing funding support to issuers of bonds in Hong Kong for the first time. The HKMA works closely with the government to revise relevant legislation, expanding the scope of investment income eligible for tax exemption under the "Qualifying Debt Instrument Programme". The HKMA also enhances market promotion activities, showcasing Hong Kong’s advantages through large-scale and specialised outreach events that promote Hong Kong as a green finance, infrastructure financing, and corporate treasury centre hub.

src_raw: 在國際層面，金管局領導多個區內及國際委員會。金管局現正擔任金融穩定理事會轄下監管合作常設委員會主席、巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（巴塞爾委員會）轄下監管及實施準則小組，以及東亞及太平洋地區中央銀行會議(EMEAP) 轄下金融市場工作小組主席。
mt_raw: On the international front, the HKMA leads several regional and global committees. Currently, the HKMA serves as Chair of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision’s (BCBS) Framework Implementation and Oversight Committee, Chair of the Financial Market Working Group under the East Asia and Pacific Central Banks’ Group (EMEAP), and Chair of the Basel Committee’s Supervision and Implementation Standards Subgroup.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2018年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The secure and efficient operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure provides a solid foundation for Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. The four RTGS systems for banking clearance, the Central Clearing and Settlement System (CMU), and the Hong Kong Trade Repository (HKTR) achieved 100% system availability in 2018, exceeding the target of 99.95%. Through accounts in two mainland China central securities depositories, the CMU continues to facilitate the settlement of northbound Bond Connect trades and holds mainland securities for relevant CMU members.

src_raw: 為促進零售支付業的整體安全及效率，金管局於8月根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）指定多兩個零售支付系統，使其運作受到金管局監察。迄今受金管局監察的指定零售支付系統增至6個。金管局亦對16個儲值支付工具持牌人進行監管。有關持牌人積極推出新產品及服務，致力為客戶提供更多選擇及更佳的用戶體驗。與此同時，電子支票與電子帳單及繳費服務涵蓋範圍，進一步擴展至包括香港與整個廣東省的跨境支付交易。
mt_raw: To promote overall safety and efficiency in the retail payments sector, the HKMA designated two additional retail payment systems under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (PSSVO), bringing the total to six systems under HKMA supervision. The HKMA also supervises 16 stored-value payment licensees, whose products and services are actively being introduced to provide more options and better user experiences for customers. At the same time, the scope of electronic cheques, e-bills, and payment services has been further expanded to include cross-border transactions within Hong Kong and across Guangdong Province.

src_raw: 金管局於同月推出香港零售支付共用二維碼標準及相關流動應用程式「香港共用二維碼」(HKQR)，是全球首創將多個二維碼整合成為個綜合二維碼的流動應用程式，方便商戶尤其中小企以同一個二維碼接受不同支付服務營運商的支付方案，無需向客戶展示多個二維碼。
mt_raw: In the same month, the HKMA launched the Hong Kong Retail Payment Common QR Code Standard and the related mobile application "Hong Kong Common QR Code" (HKQR), which is the world’s first to integrate multiple QR codes into a single unified mobile application. This facilitates merchants, especially SMEs, to accept payments from various mobile payment providers through a single QR code, eliminating the need to display multiple codes to customers.

src_raw: 開放API是指透過向第三方服務供應商開放銀行的相關數據，更好更方便地融合銀行與其他行業的服務。用家單用一個系統就能在安全環境下享受綜合服務。為促進銀行界研發及提供開放API，金管局於7月發布開放API框架。該框架採用風險為本原則，並分4個階段落實各項開放API功能。截至2019年1月底，20間銀行已開放第一階段約500個開放API接口，涵蓋逾1,000項產品及服務的資料。
mt_raw: Open API refers to the release of bank-related data to third-party service providers, enabling better and more convenient integration of banking services with other industries. Users can enjoy integrated services under a secure environment by using a single platform. To promote the research and development of open APIs within banks, the HKMA published the Open API Framework in July. This framework adopts a risk-based approach and implements various open API functionalities in four phases. By the end of January 2019, 20 banks had opened around 500 APIs in Phase 1, covering data on over 1,000 products and services.

src_raw: 建基於金管局主導的貿易融資概念驗證成果由香港多間銀行組成的聯盟於10月啟動以分布式分類帳技術(DLT)為基礎的貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」。該平台旨在透過數碼化貿易文件及自動化貿易融資流程，減低失誤及詐騙風險。截至2018年底，已有12間銀行加入成為該聯盟成員。「貿易聯動」與歐洲貿易融資平台「we.trade」於10月簽署《諒解備忘錄》，進行對接雙方平台的概念驗證。金管局亦同步探討「貿易聯動」與其他地區對接的機會，包括與新加坡金融管理局合作推出「全球貿易連接網絡」。
mt_raw: Building on the results of the HKMA-led concept verification of trade finance, a consortium of Hong Kong banks launched the "Trade Connect" trade finance platform based on distributed ledger technology (DLT) in October. The platform aims to digitise trade documents and automate trade finance processes, reducing errors and fraud risks. By the end of 2018, 12 banks had joined as members. "Trade Connect" signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the European trade finance platform "we.trade" to connect the two platforms’ proof-of-concept schemes. The HKMA is also exploring opportunities for connecting "Trade Connect" with other regions, including cooperation with the Monetary Authority of Singapore to launch the "Global Trade Connectivity Network".

src_raw: 2018年對投資者而言是困難的一年，投資環境備受多項風險因素困擾，包括美國利率持續正常化引發金融狀況收緊、主要經濟體之間的貿易摩擦升級，以及全球多處民粹主義抬頭及地緣政治風險加劇。環球股市普遍向下，美國國庫券收益率亦隨着美國聯邦儲備局4次加息而上升。在美息趨升下，美元轉強。部分新興市場面對國內嚴峻的政治及經濟壓力，其貨幣顯著下挫。儘管投資環境充滿挑戰，外匯基金在2018年仍錄得109億港元投資收入。
mt_raw: 2018 was a challenging year for investors, as the investment environment was impacted by multiple risk factors, including the sustained normalization of US interest rates leading to tightening financial conditions, escalation of trade frictions among major economies, and rising populism and geopolitical risks worldwide. Global stock markets generally declined, and US Treasury yields rose as the Federal Reserve raised interest rates four times. Amid the rising US interest rates, the US dollar strengthened. Some emerging markets faced severe political and economic pressures, leading to significant currency depreciations. Despite these challenges, the foreign exchange Fund still recorded an investment income of HKD 10.9 billion in 2018.

mt_raw: According to the Currency Board and Exchange Fund Ordinance, the primary purpose of the Exchange Fund is to directly or indirectly influence the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate, and it may also be used to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial system, thereby supporting Hong Kong’s position as an international financial centre. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), under delegated authority from the Financial Secretary, is responsible for the use and investment management of the Exchange Fund in accordance with the terms of the delegation and the applicable regulations.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一及未來基金與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and improve medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA adopts a prudent and phased approach to diversify certain assets of the Exchange Fund into more diversified asset classes, including emerging markets, Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. The emerging markets and Mainland bonds and equities are held by the investment portfolio, while private equity and real estate are held by the long-term growth portfolio. The maximum market value of the long-term growth portfolio is one-third of the cumulative surplus of the Exchange Fund plus the total of the part linked to the long-term growth portfolio within the deposits of the future fund and the subsidiaries of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，即投資基準反映的配置情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，對資產進行戰略性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment procedures of the Exchange Fund are based on strategic and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation, which reflects the investment benchmark, indicates the long-term asset configuration aimed at achieving the investment objectives. With strategic allocation as a guideline, the Fund implements tactical asset allocation to seek returns exceeding the benchmark. As a result, actual allocations often deviate from the benchmark (strategic) allocation; the difference is called “strategic deviation.” The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, sets the investment benchmark and tolerances for tracking error. The HKMA is authorized to determine the strategic asset allocation and set the permissible range of strategic deviation. Portfolio managers can hold positions within the allowed deviation range to profit from short-term market fluctuations.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，突顯風險管理的重要。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂立嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並密切監察對指引及法規的遵守情況。金管局已加強風險評估，以配合外匯基金越趨多元化的投資；另採用風險管控工具來評估在正常及極度不利市況下的市場風險。金管局亦進行詳細的投資表現因素分析，以識別促成不同表現的成因，藉此評估如何充分利用內部及外聘投資經理的投資管理技術。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, risk management has become more important. The HKMA has established strict controls and investment guidelines for both internal and external investment portfolios, closely monitoring compliance. It has enhanced risk assessment to accommodate the increasing diversification of assets and employs risk control tools to evaluate market risks under normal and adverse conditions. The HKMA also conducts detailed performance analysis to identify factors contributing to different performance outcomes, helping to fully leverage the investment management capabilities of internal and external managers.

src_raw: 金管局支持負責任投資。例如，金管局已採納證券及期貨事務監察委員會公布的《負責任的擁有權原則》。該套原則旨在協助投資者釐定如何以最佳方法履行其於香港上市公司投資的擁有權責任。就外匯基金的管理而言，金管局已就環境、社會及管治因素制定內部指引，適用於外聘基金經理的甄選、委任及監察程序。獲委任負責主動式管理香港股票組合的外聘基金經理，須在管理有關投資時遵守《負責任的擁有權原則》。整體而言，金管局已將環境、社會及管治因素納入投資及相關監察活動的內部程序。金管局會密切注視環境、社會及管治因素的相關標準的發展，並評估如何能夠將這些標準進一步融入投資程序。此外，為促進負責任投資的國際合作，金管局已成為非牟利組織FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織旨在推動長遠目標為本的業務及投資決定。
mt_raw: The HKMA supports responsible investment. For instance, it has adopted the Principles for Responsible Ownership issued by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC). These principles aim to guide investors on fulfilling their ownership responsibilities regarding Hong Kong-listed companies. Regarding the management of the Exchange Fund, the HKMA has established internal guidelines on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors, which apply to the selection, appointment, and monitoring of external fund managers. External managers appointed to actively manage Hong Kong equity portfolios are required to comply with the Principles for Responsible Ownership. Overall, the HKMA has integrated ESG considerations into its internal procedures for investment and monitoring activities. The HKMA continuously observes the development of relevant standards and assesses how to further incorporate these standards into its investment procedures. Additionally, to promote international cooperation on responsible investment, the HKMA has become a member of FCLTGlobal, a non-profit organization dedicated to advancing long-term, values-based business and investment decisions.

src_raw: 在2018年，原先被市場低估的多項風險因素一一浮現，包括美國利率正常化的步伐、美國政府外貿政策和保護主義對全球貿易的衝擊，以及地緣政治的風險，環球金融市場因而出現大幅波動及調整。
mt_raw: In 2018, many risks initially underestimated by markets surfaced one after another, including the normalization pace of US interest rates, US trade policies and protectionism impacts on global trade, and geopolitical risks. As a result, global financial markets experienced significant volatility and adjustments.

src_raw: 中美貿易爭議升級，令投資者非常憂慮，新興市場及香港股市自1月底開始反覆下跌，恒生指數自該月份的高位最多下跌27%。自第4季起，主要歐美股市亦大幅下滑，錄得雙位數字跌幅。就2018年整體而言，全球股市普遍下跌，涵蓋已發展國家股市的MSCI全球指數下跌10.4%，MSCI新興市場指數亦下跌16.6%。
mt_raw: The US-China trade tensions escalated, causing considerable concerns among investors. Emerging markets and Hong Kong stock markets experienced volatile declines from late January, with the Hang Seng Index dropping by as much as 27% from its high in that month. From the fourth quarter onwards, major European and US stock markets also declined sharply, with double-digit drops. Overall, global equity markets declined in 2018: the MSCI World Index fell by 10.4%, and the MSCI Emerging Markets Index dropped by 16.6%.

src_raw: 債市方面，由於美國貨幣政策正常化，美國國庫券收益率於2018年大致向上。然而，年內債市仍有波動。例如10年期美國國庫券收益率由年初約2.5%上升至11月3.2%的7年新高，但至年底時受投資者憂慮中美貿易爭議及趨向避險投資所影響而回軟至2.7%。
mt_raw: In fixed income markets, US Treasury yields generally rose due to normalizing US monetary policy. Despite volatility within the year— for instance, the 10-year US Treasury yield rose from about 2.5% at the start to a seven-year high of 3.2% on November 3— by year-end it softened to 2.7%, influenced by concerns over US-China trade disputes and a flight to safe assets.

src_raw: 貨幣市場方面，年內美元跟隨美國加息轉強。美匯指數上升4.4%，歐元及人民幣等主要貨幣兌美元下跌約5%。此外，部分新興市場受到國內政局及經濟不穩影響，其貨幣進一步受挫。例如，阿根廷披索及土耳其里拉兌美元分別下跌約五成及三成。相比之下，避險投資需求帶動日圓兌美元上升2.7%。
mt_raw: In the currency markets, the US dollar strengthened, following US rate hikes. The US dollar index rose by 4.4%, while major currencies such as the euro and renminbi depreciated by about 5% against the US dollar. Moreover, some emerging market currencies, affected by domestic political and economic instability, suffered further depreciation— for example, the Argentine peso and Turkish lira fell by around 50% and 30%, respectively. Conversely, the yen appreciated by 2.7% against the US dollar amid safe-haven demand.

mt_raw: The HKMA’s institutional website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 60,000 pages of information in both English and traditional and simplified Chinese, facilitating public access to the latest information. The website also hosts records of “Recognized Institutions and Local Representative Offices,” kept under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as records of “Employees of Recognized Institutions and Securities Firms,” and records of “Licenses for Stored Value Payment Service Providers,” kept pursuant to the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. mt_raw: To promote the adoption of open application programming interfaces (APIs) in banking, the HKMA leads by example by providing open APIs on its website starting July, allowing the public to access key information easily. The first batch of 50 open API data sets was successfully launched in July, covering commonly checked categories such as banking system statistics, the Exchange Fund, press releases, and schedules for cash-in-transit vehicles. The remaining 80 data sets will be phased in before mid-2019. To further facilitate public access to HKMA’s latest news and information, the HKMA is undertaking a comprehensive overhaul of its website design and content, aiming for a more user-friendly experience. The new website is expected to go live within 2019.

src_raw: 資訊中心的貨幣展區介紹香港紙幣與硬幣的設計、防偽特徵、製作過程及其他趣味知識。該展區在2018年第1季展開翻新工程，加入多項互動元素，例如寓學習於玩樂的遊戲，使訪客對香港貨幣有所認識之餘，更可樂在其中。此外，貨幣展區新增一棵藝術紫荊樹，是由2,018顆以不再適合流通並已切碎鈔票為媒材製成的透明立方塊拼綴而成，與展區內另一幅以香港硬幣為媒材砌成的馬賽克作品相映成趣。全新形象的貨幣展區於8月16日重新開放。
mt_raw: The currency exhibit area displays designs, anti-counterfeiting features, production processes, and interesting facts about Hong Kong banknotes and coins. Renovation work was undertaken in Q1 2018, incorporating interactive elements such as educational games that allow visitors to learn about Hong Kong’s currency in an engaging way. The exhibit area also features a new art installation—a glass sculptural “Bauhinia Tree” made from 2,018 shredded banknotes rendered unusable for circulation, arranged into a three-dimensional cube, complemented by a mosaic artwork of Hong Kong coins inside the same area. The reimagined currency exhibition was reopened on August 16.

src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，並按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: Salary increments and variable pay for individual staff are approved by the Financial Secretary after consulting the governing board, with affected employees recusing themselves when their remuneration is discussed. Fixed salary adjustments and variable pay for staff at the management level and above are approved by the Financial Secretary based on the total approved allocation, with the relevant employees excusing themselves from meetings discussing their pay. Employees at supervisory and lower levels have fixed salary adjustments and variable pay determined by the HKMA Chief Executive under delegation from the Financial Secretary, based on the total approved remuneration budget.

src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My objective is to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with Hong Kong Standards on Auditing prescribed by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. A misstatement can arise from fraud or error. If it is material, whether due to fraud or error, it could influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.

terms: {'審計憑證': 'audit evidence', '財務報表': 'financial statements'}
src_raw:
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；
- 判定金融管理專員以持續經營作為會計基礎的做法是否恰當，並根據所得的審計憑證，判定是否存在與事件或情況有關，而且可能對集團持續經營的能力構成重大疑慮的重大不確定性。如果我認為存在重大不確定性，則有必要在審計師報告中請使用者留意財務報表中的相關資料披露。假若所披露的相關資料不足，我便須發出非無保留意見的審計師報告。我的結論是基於截至審計師報告日止所取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致集團不能繼續持續經營；
- 評價財務報表的整體列報方式、結構和內容，包括披露資料，以及財務報表是否中肯反映交易和事項；及
- 就集團中實體或業務活動的財務資料獲取充足和適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見承擔全部責任。
